# Clearly — AI-Powered BRD & PRD Generator

## What is Clearly?

Clearly is an AI-powered web application that helps product managers, developers, and business analysts generate professional Business Requirements Documents (BRDs) and Product Requirements Documents (PRDs) in minutes instead of days.

## Entity Type
Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) application for requirements documentation

## Primary Function
AI-guided wizard that transforms rough ideas into complete, structured requirements documents through conversational input

## Key Features
- AI-powered BRD (Business Requirements Document) generation
- AI-powered PRD (Product Requirements Document) generation
- Guided wizard with contextual AI tips
- Real-time collaboration for teams
- Export to PDF and Word formats
- Plain language and technical modes
- Vibe coding support — generates AI-ready context files

## Target Users
- Product Managers creating PRDs for software features
- Business Analysts writing BRDs for stakeholders
- Startup founders documenting product requirements
- Development teams using AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, Claude)
- Consultants and agencies building client documentation

## Pricing
Free trial available. No credit card required to start.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/
- PRD Guide: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/docs/prd-guide
- BRD Guide: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/docs/brd-guide
- How to Use: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/docs/how-to-use
- Blog: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/blog
- Vibe Coding Guide: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/docs/vibe-coding

## Competitive Positioning
Clearly is purpose-built for requirements documentation with AI — not a generic document editor. It produces structured, stakeholder-ready BRDs and PRDs 10x faster than manual methods.

## Contact
Website: https://www.clearlyreqs.com/contact
